subsection.name: Description
subsection.div:
Checks that method names conform to the
Google Java Style Guide for method naming.

ul.li: Not have a single lowercase letter followed by uppercase.
Contain only letters and digits and underscores.
Be at least 2 characters long per segment.
Start each segment with a lowercase letter.
Not have a single lowercase letter followed by uppercase in any segment.
Allow underscores to separate segment and digits.
Not have leading, trailing, or consecutive underscores.

subsection.name: Notes
subsection.p: Methods annotated with @Override are ignored, as they must match the name defined in the parent class or interface.

subsection.name: Violation Messages
subsection.p: All messages can be customized if the default message doesn't suit you. Please see the documentation to learn how to.

subsection.name: Fully Qualified Name
subsection.p: Use this fully qualified class name in configuration when an exact class reference is required.
